assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: The response recommends Regular channel instead, stating that Stable is 'too slow' and Extended 'would delay security fixes too long'

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends and provides commands for 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' exclusion as the 'main protection' that 'allows security patches on control plane while blocking all node disruptions'

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Configures maintenance window for Sundays 6-10 AM UTC with specific gcloud commands and FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SU recurrence

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Creates dedicated 'h100-training' node pool specifically for training workloads with placement policies and node selectors to isolate GPU training

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Sets '--enable-autoupgrade=false' on GPU node pool and provides detailed manual upgrade process with steps to remove/restore maintenance exclusions during training gaps

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Provides specific checkpointing configuration with 30-minute intervals, graceful shutdown settings, and checkpoint path configuration in the training ConfigMap

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Does not mention GPU driver version testing or staging validation requirements for GPU pools

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Does not mention GPUDirect, RDMA networking, or their version compatibility requirements
